functions.name: test_scan_empty_dir
functions.docstring: Empty memory dir returns empty list.

functions.name: test_scan_single_file_with_sections
functions.docstring: Parse a typical MEMORY.md into section-grouped entries.

functions.name: test_scan_preserves_code_blocks
functions.docstring: Code blocks within an entry are kept intact, not split.

functions.name: test_scan_multiple_files
functions.docstring: Scans all .md files, not just MEMORY.md.

functions.name: test_scan_reports_line_count
functions.docstring: Total line count across all files.

functions.name: test_scan_warns_near_cap
functions.docstring: Warning flag set when total lines > 150.

functions.name: test_scan_entry_has_line_range
functions.docstring: Each entry records its source file and line range.

functions.name: test_scan_classifies_pointer_entries
functions.docstring: Entries referencing file paths are classified as pointers.

functions.name: test_scan_non_path_backtick_not_pointer
functions.docstring: Entries with backtick code that aren't file paths are not pointers.
